subcodes.first_line: Verily, the ocean of utterance hath surged, and the fragrance of the All-Merciful hath been wafted, yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ماج بحر البیان و هاج عرف الرحمن و القوم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @Word of God and human limitations, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
